---
title: "Decision Simulator"
subtitle: "What profile does your AI-operated entity present?"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple"}
**Illustrative mode.** The questions map to the six canonical concepts; the classification
thresholds are doctrine under review (RFC-0001). This tool educates — it does not adjudicate.
:::

Answer five questions and see which profile the entity presents — and which concepts explain why.

```{=html}
<div id="alp-sim"></div>
<script>
(function(){
const T={
 q1:{q:"1/5 — Is the entity recorded in an authoritative public registry?",h:"Registry is the entry ticket to legal personhood.",y:"q2",n:"rNoReg"},
 q2:{q:"2/5 — Does it have a declared operator and traceable ultimate beneficiaries?",h:"Someone identifiable must stand behind the entity.",y:"q3",n:"rVac"},
 q3:{q:"3/5 — Are its governance rules publicly declared?",h:"Declared rules are what courts measure conduct against.",y:"q4",n:"rGov"},
 q4:{q:"4/5 — Does it keep auditable records (logs, provenance, dated corrections)?",h:"No trail, no adjudication.",y:"q5",n:"rAud"},
 q5:{q:"5/5 — Does it hold its own assets to answer for damages?",h:"Patrimony answers first.",y:"rFull",n:"rAgent"}};
const R={
 rNoReg:{t:"No registry → no legal person",d:"Without an authoritative registry record the entity has no legal existence to anchor identity, continuity or liability.",c:[["Artificial Registry","../../core/concepts/artificial-registry.html"],["Artificial Identity","../../core/concepts/artificial-identity.html"]]},
 rVac:{t:"Responsibility-vacuum risk",d:"An acting entity without a traceable answerable party — the exact failure mode a lawful regime must prevent.",c:[["Liability","../../core/concepts/liability.html"],["Artificial Registry","../../core/concepts/artificial-registry.html"]]},
 rGov:{t:"Ungoverned entity",d:"With no declared rules there is no standard to adjudicate conduct against.",c:[["Governance","../../core/concepts/governance.html"]]},
 rAud:{t:"Not auditable",d:"Even a perfect liability regime has nothing to act on without an inspectable trail.",c:[["Audit","../../core/concepts/audit.html"],["Liability","../../core/concepts/liability.html"]]},
 rFull:{t:"Illustrative profile: full-stack artificial legal person",d:"Registry + accountability + governance + audit + patrimony: the profile a complete artificial legal person would present. (Illustrative — doctrine under RFC review.)",c:[["All six concepts","../../core/concepts/README.html"]]},
 rAgent:{t:"Operated agent (no own patrimony)",d:"Without assets of its own, liability falls on the declared operator: the entity acts, the operator answers.",c:[["Liability","../../core/concepts/liability.html"],["Governance","../../core/concepts/governance.html"]]}};
let cur="q1",path=[];
const el=document.getElementById("alp-sim");
function render(){
 if(T[cur]){const n=T[cur];
  el.innerHTML='<div style="border:1px solid #d0d4dc;border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem;background:#fafbfc">'
   +'<p style="font-weight:600;margin:0 0 .3rem">'+n.q+'</p>'
   +'<p style="color:#555;font-size:.9rem;margin:0 0 1rem">'+n.h+'</p>'
   +'<button onclick="ALP.a(\'y\')" style="margin-right:.6rem;padding:.45rem 1.3rem;border:0;border-radius:6px;background:#1f2a44;color:#fff;cursor:pointer">Yes</button>'
   +'<button onclick="ALP.a(\'n\')" style="padding:.45rem 1.3rem;border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#1f2a44;cursor:pointer">No</button>'
   +(path.length?'<p style="margin:.9rem 0 0;font-size:.8rem;color:#888">Path: '+path.join(" → ")+'</p>':'')+'</div>';
 } else {const r=R[cur];
  el.innerHTML='<div style="border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:8px;padding:1.2rem;background:#f4f6fa">'
   +'<p style="font-weight:700;margin:0 0 .4rem;color:#1f2a44">'+r.t+'</p>'
   +'<p style="margin:0 0 .8rem">'+r.d+'</p>'
   +'<p style="margin:0 0 1rem;font-size:.9rem">Read: '+r.c.map(x=>'<a href="'+x[1]+'">'+x[0]+'</a>').join(" · ")+'</p>'
   +'<button onclick="ALP.reset()" style="padding:.4rem 1.1rem;border:1px solid #1f2a44;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#1f2a44;cursor:pointer">Start again</button></div>';}}
window.ALP={a:function(x){path.push(x==="y"?"Yes":"No");cur=T[cur][x];render()},reset:function(){cur="q1";path=[];render()}};
render();
})();
</script>
```
